meta.title: Level 4 Checkpoint
meta.description: Mixed response scenarios across all opening types

blocks.prompt:
Partner opens 1♠. Describe how you would choose your response with these three different hands:

1. You hold ♠Q74 ♥J83 ♦KT52 ♣964 (3 spades, 8 points)
2. You hold ♠5 ♥AKJ84 ♦AQ73 ♣J62 (0 spades, 14 points)
3. You hold ♠KJ873 ♥Q4 ♦A83 ♣952 (5 spades, 12 points)

For each hand, explain what your priorities are and what bid you'd choose.
